STDM_0000101_0010.Text: Man, so this is Harajuku! What a crazy town! I bet Tokyo has tons of stations this huge.

STDM_0000101_0030.Text: This school's got good grub! I could get used to the urban life.

STDM_0000101_0040.Text: You think a place like this is urban...?

STDM_0000101_0050.Text: Hey, Fushiguro. You ain't gonna eat your bell peppers?

STDM_0000101_0060.Text: I don't like the sweet dishes.

STDM_0000101_0070.Text: Sweet? Isn't a bell pepper just a palette swap of a green pepper? What's the diff?

STDM_0000101_0080.Text: There's a huge "diff." It's fleshier, like fruit, with a tinge of sweetness to it.

STDM_0000101_0090.Text: Huh, really? I just thought they were, like, pepper shiny variants or something.

STDM_0000101_0100.Text: You're not gonna eat a dish the housemother poured all her TLC into? Really?

STDM_0000101_0120.Text: It's all good, I got enough pepper room in my guts for both of us.

STDM_0000201_0010.Text: Okey dokey, this should be good.

STDM_0000201_0030.Text: Don't just hand it over to me like it's something to do!

STDM_0000201_0040.Text: The hell you think you guys are here for, then?

STDM_0000201_0050.Text: You mean you brought us here to be your pack animals?!

STDM_0000201_0070.Text: Hey, Fushiguro! You take some of these!

STDM_0000201_0090.Text: Oh yeah, you can store stuff in your shadow, right?

STDM_0000201_0100.Text: With a power like that, I can shop 'til I drop! I really am a genius.

STDM_0000201_0110.Text: Well then, why should I have to carry stuff?!

STDM_0000201_0120.Text: Nothing doing. Sounds like a pain.

STDM_0000201_0130.Text: Come on! Selfish guys never make it with the ladies, y'know.

STDM_0000201_0140.Text: First off, I'd be in big shit for using my Cursed Technique in a city like this.

STDM_0000201_0150.Text: Why'd you even buy all of these clothes in the first place?

STDM_0000201_0160.Text: Duh, the new line just came out. And there's more where that came from! Let's go.

STDM_0000201_0170.Text: Seven outfits is more than enough, ain't it?

STDM_0000201_0180.Text: Not sure how I feel about the weekly rotation bit, but I pretty much agree with him.

STDM_0000201_0190.Text: Don't lump a lady in with a hoodie halfwit and jet-black jacket jerk like you. I'll friggin' end you.

STDM_0000201_0210.Text: Why am I getting raked over the coals...

STDM_0000301_0010.Text: Hey, Itadori! You're free, aren't you? Would you lug this stuff to my room?

STDM_0000301_0050.Text: Hey... You all good? All things considered.

STDM_0000301_0060.Text: All things considered? Well yeah, I guess. My body's fine, all the holes have closed up.

STDM_0000301_0070.Text: Holes? No, I'm not... *sigh* I'm talking about your mental state, stupid! But hey, if you're good, then fine by me.

STDM_0000301_0090.Text: ...Well, I appreciate the concern, at any rate. Thanks.

STDM_0000301_0110.Text: Oww! Man, I seriously don't get where you're coming from!

STDM_0000401_0010.Text: Good morning, Yuji Itadori! It's time for class!

STDM_0000401_0030.Text: Today's a special class, taught by the super-hot, super-strong, super Sorcerer: Satoru Gojo!

STDM_0000401_0040.Text: So that's how it's gonna be today? Sure, got it.

STDM_0000401_0060.Text: Aren't you gonna teach something first?!

STDM_0000401_0070.Text: I've gotta see for myself just how well Ijichi's been teaching you, my dear Yuji.

STDM_0000401_0080.Text: I hate the idea of Ijichi getting another stomachache 'cause of me...

STDM_0000401_0090.Text: Guess you'd better pass with flying colors, then!

STDM_0000401_0110.Text: This is a school, after all. If you don't get a certain amount of credits, we'll have to hold you back.

STDM_0000401_0120.Text: Wow... You almost sounded like a teacher there for a sec, Gojo...

STDM_0000401_0140.Text: 42. That's a fail for sure. Still, you were strangely on the mark about Abe no Seimei.

STDM_0000401_0160.Text: Huh. Then, do you think you'd learn about Michizane Sugawara if it was in movie form?

STDM_0000401_0170.Text: Yessir! I'm great at watching movies!

STDM_0000401_0180.Text: Okay, we'll do a re-test after you watch it, then! I'll just have a nice cuppa tea.

STDM_0000401_0200.Text: ...Hold up. Shouldn't he be doing more teacher stuff?

STDM_0000501_0010.Text: Oookay, pipe down, now! It's the moment you've all been waiting for: report card time!

STDM_0000501_0020.Text: So Jujutsu High has report cards too, huh?

STDM_0000501_0030.Text: I went ahead and made some!

STDM_0000501_0040.Text: Having this oaf evaluate me makes my skin crawl...

STDM_0000501_0050.Text: Here, Megumi. Immaculate work in the classroom, as usual!

STDM_0000501_0070.Text:
Next, Nobara: You've done quite well for having just got here.
Due to fine fundamentals, I bet!

STDM_0000501_0110.Text: Focus a bit harder in class, mmkay?

STDM_0000501_0130.Text: Still, passing marks, considering you just transferred in from a regular high school. Keep up the good work!

STDM_0000501_0150.Text: Well! Now that the semester is over, it's time for...

STDM_0000501_0210.Text: Is the teacher supposed to tag along?

STDM_0000501_0220.Text: It's all good, that means he's paying!

STDM_0000501_0230.Text:
You go to karaoke, Gojo?
What's your go-to song?

STDM_0000501_0240.Text: You'll have to wait and see when we get there. Here we go, people!

STDM_0000601_0010.Text: Hey, Nanami! Is it true your hobby's cooking?

STDM_0000601_0020.Text: That's right. I presume Gojo told you?

STDM_0000601_0030.Text: Whattaya put in your stew? My fish balls are the bomb!

STDM_0000601_0040.Text: You know your way around a kitchen, too?

STDM_0000601_0050.Text: A li'l bit, yeah. I taught Fushiguro how to make fish balls a little while ago.

STDM_0000601_0060.Text: Teach me your top recipe, man!

STDM_0000601_0070.Text: Mine is nothing to write home about.

STDM_0000601_0080.Text: Boy, I wanna check out your home cooking for myself!

STDM_0000601_0090.Text: I'll pass, sounds like too much trouble.

STDM_0000601_0100.Text: Sheesh, you could at least PRETEND we'll do it later!

STDM_0000701_0010.Text: Say, Nanami, you said working for a living sucks, right? I'm a student, so I have no clue. What's it like?

STDM_0000701_0030.Text: We're students now, but students that work fighting Cursed Spirits, right? I just wondered what being a normal working adult is like.

STDM_0000701_0040.Text: Made to kowtow to authority, ingratiate yourself to others. Working adults must show deference.

STDM_0000701_0050.Text: "Deh-fur-ense"? You mean like, going along with others?

STDM_0000701_0060.Text: To put it very, very crudely, yes.

STDM_0000701_0070.Text: That's a good thing, isn't it?

STDM_0000701_0080.Text: ...People like you go out into the world, and are shaped into adults by hardships. Still, a part of me wants you to stay as you are.

STDM_0000701_0100.Text: I mean exactly what I say.

STDM_0000801_0030.Text: You smell really good! Way better than you should!

STDM_0000801_0040.Text: How churlish, brother! Men must pay heed to good grooming at all times!

STDM_0000801_0060.Text: No telling when I'll run into Takada in the city, y'know!

STDM_0000801_0070.Text: Well, she does live in the country. There's a non-zero chance for sure...

STDM_0000801_0080.Text: Listen, brother. You'd do well to be prepared at all times.

STDM_0000801_0090.Text: It's a great scent, that's a fact.

STDM_0000801_0100.Text: Still, the gap between my eyes and my nose is making my head spin...

STDM_0000801_0110.Text: Tell ya what, brother! If you like them so much, I'll show you all my favorite deodorant and cologne brands later!

STDM_0000901_0010.Text: Itadori! I'll be heading back to Kyoto soon.

STDM_0000901_0020.Text: Oh, is that right? Have a great trip back!

STDM_0000901_0030.Text: Before I go, though, there's something I gotta ask you.

STDM_0000901_0060.Text: Huh? Another question about my preferences? I'd probably go with noodles... And rice dishes, I guess.

STDM_0000901_0070.Text: Okay, and what about your hobbies?

STDM_0000901_0080.Text: My hobbies...? Well, there's karaoke, watching television, stuff like that...

STDM_0000901_0090.Text: Cool, cool, got it. Don't slack off on your daily training, now! Peace!

STDM_0000901_0100.Text: What? That's it?! You're not gonna delve deeper?

STDM_0000901_0110.Text: You're freaking me out, man! The hell kind of questions were those?!

STDM_0001001_0020.Text: I need to get stronger so I can beat that jerk!

STDM_0001001_0030.Text: Gojo would be a more appropriate choice for training, wouldn't he?

STDM_0001001_0040.Text: I mean, I guess so? You and Gojo have your own ways of doing things, right?

STDM_0001001_0050.Text: He's taught me plenty, but I figured it'd be good to learn a thing or two from you, too.

STDM_0001001_0070.Text: I'm not a teacher, but...if I must, I must.

STDM_0001001_0090.Text: Your power is above average, yes, but I'd say your positivity is a part of that strength.

STDM_0001001_0100.Text: I'm a busy man, so I'll make sure what I teach sticks the first time.

STDM_0001001_0110.Text: Okay! ...Um, but can I really learn something in one go?

STDM_0001001_0120.Text: I'm telling you to train with that level of determination.

STDM_0001101_0010.Text: Did you draw that Cursed Spirit sketch, Gojo?

STDM_0001101_0020.Text: You know it! Pretty good, right?

STDM_0001101_0030.Text: Well, I mean, you got the important bits down, but...

STDM_0001101_0040.Text: Don't you think it's more like this?

STDM_0001101_0050.Text: Oh, you wanna throw down with teach in a sketch-off? Fine, I'll take you on!

STDM_0001101_0060.Text: Nope, not even a little bit.

STDM_0001101_0070.Text: If you draw something that can satisfy me, I'll even give you a special prize!

STDM_0001101_0080.Text: That's what I'm talking about! What're we drawing?!

STDM_0001101_0110.Text: She'll have my head on a pike later! Nuh-uh, no way!

STDM_0001201_0010.Text: In the end, I couldn't finish it off...

STDM_0001201_0020.Text: Turn that frown upside-down, brother. You've gotten stronger, no doubt about it.

STDM_0001201_0030.Text: Think about it: you've only just entered Jujutsu High, and you pushed a Special Grade that far.

STDM_0001201_0040.Text: You shouldn't overestimate your strength, sure, but you shouldn't underestimate it either. Believe in yourself, brother! You're getting strong, trust me!

STDM_0001201_0060.Text: Come on, let's run along the river!

STDM_0001201_0080.Text: Best friends run along the riverbed with the setting sun at their backs, everybody knows that!

STDM_0001201_0090.Text: They do? And wait, since when did we become best friends?!

STDM_0001301_0010.Text: Hey y'all, how's it—uhh, okay. What's with the sourpuss parade?

STDM_0001301_0020.Text: Nitta gave us a real tongue-lashing over the Yasohachi Bridge incident.

STDM_0001301_0040.Text: Why'd I get dragged into it, though...

STDM_0001301_0050.Text: Dragged nothing, you're just as guilty!

STDM_0001301_0060.Text: Well, you've gotta expect a slap on the wrist if you go running off on your own.

STDM_0001301_0070.Text: But the fact remains, you first-years took down a Special Grade.

STDM_0001301_0080.Text: I suppose I ought to admit how proud I am of your growth.

STDM_0001301_0100.Text: Just what I'd expect from the students of great teacher Gojo!

STDM_0001301_0110.Text: You're just proud of yourself, damn it!

STDM_0001401_0010.Text: You're up, Fushiguro! Show us around Tokyo!

STDM_0001401_0030.Text: What, you're the one who was all, "Lookit me, I'm a big city boy."

STDM_0001401_0050.Text: I'm not expecting fancy from you. Just show us some good hole-in-the-wall joints.

STDM_0001401_0070.Text: What's this, a clothing store? Where's the staff?

STDM_0001401_0090.Text: A secondhand bookstore? Where's the staff?

STDM_0001401_0110.Text: Yeek! You weren't kidding... I thought that was a Cursed Spirit...

STDM_0001401_0120.Text: Hey, what's with this lineup, man?

STDM_0001401_0130.Text: You wanted hole-in-the-wall spots, you got 'em.

STDM_0001401_0140.Text: I meant hidden gems, not literal holes in walls!

STDM_0001401_0160.Text: I'm the idiot for expecting even a little bit from you. I'm exhausted! Let's grab some tea at a cafe, you're buying.

STDM_0001401_0170.Text: You really are a pain in my neck... I'll show you one last place.

STDM_0001401_0180.Text: Hmph. I'll go, but I won't get my hopes up.

STDM_0001401_0190.Text: It's quiet, good atmosphere, and the cream soda's cute! So you DO know some good spots!

STDM_0001401_0200.Text: Actually, the other places you took us were pretty cool, too. Not that I'll ever go back there.

STDM_0001401_0210.Text: Could've stopped at the first part.

STDM_0001501_0030.Text: The way you crush cans, it's just...

STDM_0001501_0050.Text: It takes some mad grip strength to crush one vertically.

STDM_0001501_0060.Text: You're just slacking off on your training, is all.

STDM_0001501_0100.Text: You can pretty much crush anything, huh?

STDM_0001501_0110.Text: I wouldn't say that. There is something I've yet to have the pleasure of obliterating.

STDM_0001501_0140.Text: This feeling... Whatever it is, it's not good.

STDM_0001601_0010.Text: Did you learn how to handle a three-section staff somewhere?

STDM_0001601_0030.Text: It's just, the way you handled it off the bat, I figured you had some experience with it.

STDM_0001601_0040.Text: Even without experience, I can usually figure it out by feeling.

STDM_0001601_0050.Text: That'd be impossible for most people without training, you know...

STDM_0001601_0060.Text: So you can use any weapon?

STDM_0001601_0070.Text: Yep. Edged weapons are all basically the same, right? Long ones all resemble each other—concealed weapons, too.

STDM_0001601_0080.Text: So you can turn anything you lay your eyes on into a weapon?

STDM_0001601_0100.Text: I'd take a rock off the ground, if it'd do in a pinch.

STDM_0001601_0110.Text: You learn something new every day.

STDM_0001701_0030.Text: What're those two up to, I wonder? Can't hear them from here.

STDM_0001701_0040.Text: Looks like they're watching something on a smartphone. Toge loves that sorta thing—practically binges the stuff.

STDM_0001701_0070.Text: Whaaat?! Did Fushiguro just smile a little?!

STDM_0001701_0080.Text: Not from where I was standing.

STDM_0001701_0090.Text: I swear I saw his lip quiver a bit! I don't think I wanna know what they're watching...

STDM_0001701_0100.Text: Maybe he and Inumaki have the same sense of humor?

STDM_0001701_0110.Text: I didn't think Toge was on the list of upperclassmen he respected carte blanche.

STDM_0001701_0120.Text: Your animal playlist is pretty solid, Inumaki.

STDM_0001801_0010.Text: Yooo, Megumi! We've come to say hello.

STDM_0001801_0040.Text: I heard you flew way too close to the sun back there.

STDM_0001801_0060.Text: Yeah, what he said! Most of our missions are dangerous at the best of times, you shouldn't act on your own.

STDM_0001801_0080.Text: Itadori told us that you passed out with Sukuna's finger in hand.

STDM_0001801_0100.Text: Still, I'm just glad you're safe and sound. Well...more "safe," less "sound."

STDM_0001801_0110.Text: That's why we brought you some fruit to eat!

STDM_0001801_0130.Text: Your doting seniors will peel them into bunny shapes for you!

STDM_0001801_0160.Text: Huh? No, I'm telling you I can eat them myself. What do you think you're doing?!

STDM_0001801_0170.Text: Just seeing how much you've grown made me wanna look after you, Megumi!

STDM_0001801_0190.Text: Please stop, this is getting gross...

STDM_0001801_0200.Text: There's nothing gross about seniors doting on their juniors!

STDM_0001801_0220.Text: And here we go, another hassle...

STDM_0001901_0010.Text: Say, Megumi, you release Shikigami from your shadow, right?

STDM_0001901_0030.Text: It's just, I always gotta get carried around like a stuffed animal when I'm on the move, so—

STDM_0001901_0050.Text: But I haven't said anything yet!

STDM_0001901_0060.Text: You don't have to, I see what you're getting at.

STDM_0001901_0070.Text: You could at least go along with it a bit longer...

STDM_0001901_0080.Text: You'd better be nicer to this panda, or I'll report you to an animal rights group.

STDM_0001901_0090.Text: I'm happy to oblige any requests that aren't super weird.

STDM_0001901_0100.Text: This is a request from your ole pal, Panda! I'm just as cute as those Shikigami of yours...

STDM_0001901_0110.Text: Go on, give the fluff a good rub!

STDM_0002001_0010.Text: Yo, Fushiguro! I hear you threw down with Todo, too?

STDM_0002001_0030.Text: So did he ask you that stuff about your type?

STDM_0002001_0060.Text: I could ask the same to you.

STDM_0002001_0080.Text: A tall woman, with a big ass!

STDM_0002001_0100.Text: I told you mine, now you gotta tell me yours, Fushiguro!

STDM_0002101_0010.Text: Hey Inumaki, did you understand the language used by that tree-like Special Grade Cursed Spirit from before?

STDM_0002101_0030.Text: Seeing as how you can only communicate using rice ball flavors, I figured...I dunno, that you might get it.

STDM_0002101_0050.Text: Yeah, it's true that I can pick up what you're putting down.

STDM_0002101_0090.Text: Even if you can't speak a language, you can sort of figure it out by gestures and energy on the spot, right?

STDM_0002101_0110.Text: It's pretty much the same, yeah.

STDM_0002201_0020.Text: Of course! I plowed through all the macarons, canelés, and pancakes I couldn't get in the sticks.

STDM_0002201_0030.Text: Glad to hear it! We're lacking in the sweet tooth department around here, y'know?

STDM_0002201_0050.Text: So whattaya say, want to check this spot out?

STDM_0002201_0060.Text: Oh, this shop's been pretty popular lately! You sure know your stuff.

STDM_0002201_0070.Text: I've sampled most of the delicacies around here!

STDM_0002201_0080.Text: Such lofty ambitions... That's a Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer for you.

STDM_0002201_0090.Text: Now then, today's my treat! Let's go, go, go!

STDM_0002301_0010.Text: You've got a great body, Maki! How do you do it? Yoga? Beauty treatments?!

STDM_0002301_0020.Text: Do I really look like I care about that stuff?

STDM_0002301_0030.Text: Well, sure! You've got that tight waist, firm calves that're perfect for heels... Anyone would be envious!

STDM_0002301_0050.Text: Come on, there's gotta be something! I bet you're not even aware of it—part of your daily routine, or something!

STDM_0002301_0060.Text: The only thing I do on the daily is strength training.

STDM_0002301_0070.Text: Strength training?! Your workout menu's overkill, Maki... Totally out of my league.

STDM_0002301_0080.Text: Aww MAN, how do I get a body like yours?! But, like, without trying!

STDM_0002301_0090.Text: You're just fine the way you are...

STDM_0002301_0120.Text: If you say so, then I believe it! I'd say I've earned myself a little pudding!

STDM_0002301_0130.Text: I can't tell if you're observant or oblivious...

STDM_0002401_0010.Text: Hey Maki, what sorta clothes do you like to wear when you're off the job?

STDM_0002401_0020.Text: Lately it's been so busy, I've been stuck in my school uniform most of the time.

STDM_0002401_0030.Text: In that case, try my heels on for size!

STDM_0002401_0050.Text: I don't think I've ever seen you accessorize! Go on, give them a try!

STDM_0002401_0070.Text: A matching outfit's great, but maybe some contrast with a dress could be fun, too?

STDM_0002401_0090.Text: I bought a great dress just last week! Would you say you're more apple-shaped, Maki? Pear-shaped? Does your skin have warm undertones? Cool undertones?

STDM_0002401_0110.Text: Leave it to me! I'll put together an outfit that'll knock your socks off!

STDM_0002401_0120.Text: ...Eh, as long as she's enjoying herself, I guess.

STDM_0002501_0010.Text: Are you a dog person or a cat person, Inumaki?

STDM_0002501_0030.Text: Uh, is that really supposed to be enough to go on?

STDM_0002501_0040.Text: Is that supposed to mean "dog"? No, "cat"?

STDM_0002501_0070.Text: Hey, Fushiguro! You're the expert here, interpret for me!

STDM_0002501_0080.Text: You can figure that much out yourself, can't you?

STDM_0002501_0090.Text: Grrr! Don't act all high and mighty just because you get it!

STDM_0002501_0130.Text: You can't just say whatever bull you want! See, even HE says you're wrong!

STDM_0002601_0030.Text: Oh wow, pictures from your first year... Whoa, you look totally different!

STDM_0002601_0050.Text: Why'd you let your hair down? Oh, did you think you'd cramp Itadori's style or something?

STDM_0002601_0070.Text: You're the upperclassman, shouldn't you have made Itadori switch up his look? He came after you, after all.

STDM_0002601_0080.Text: Though hmm, straight hair like yours wouldn't look good on him, would it?

STDM_0002701_0010.Text: Hey Panda, is there someone inside there?

STDM_0002701_0020.Text: Well that came outta nowhere. Wanna check for yourself? You won't find a zipper, I promise.

STDM_0002701_0030.Text: Really? They call you an "Abrupt Mutation Cursed Corpse," but that just doesn't suit you, if you ask me.

STDM_0002701_0040.Text: It's hard to believe you're stuffed full of cotton.

STDM_0002701_0050.Text: But that's pretty much all that's in here.

STDM_0002701_0060.Text: You sure you're not just a talking panda?

STDM_0002701_0080.Text: Seems more realistic than a walking, talking plushie, no?

STDM_0002701_0090.Text: And yet, here I am! You've seen the stuffing fly outta me when I'm hurt, haven't you?

STDM_0002701_0100.Text: Y'know, a little bird told me that... Hyah!

STDM_0002701_0110.Text: Hey! Don't touch me there! I'm delicate, damn it!

STDM_0002701_0140.Text: The fact that you're ticklish proves you're more old man than panda in there.

STDM_0002701_0160.Text: I'm young at heart, damn it! That's gotta count for something!

STDM_0002801_0010.Text: At the very least, I can tell you're no ordinary bear, Panda.

STDM_0002801_0050.Text: If you're really full of cotton, that means you'd make an awesome cushion!

STDM_0002801_0060.Text: I've always wanted to dive onto a huge stuffed animal!

STDM_0002801_0080.Text: I gotta say, it's not what I was expecting.

STDM_0002801_0090.Text: Even so, how can I say this... It's fluffy...and so warm...

STDM_0002801_0110.Text: Mmm-hmm. This sensation would make anyone weak at the knees!

STDM_0002901_0030.Text: But I haven't said anything yet!

STDM_0002901_0040.Text: I didn't see anything good coming, so I beat you to the punch.

STDM_0002901_0050.Text: You contacted me when you wanted out of the rat race, yeah?

STDM_0002901_0070.Text: That means you think of me as a trustworthy senior! Makes me all warm and fuzzy inside.

STDM_0002901_0080.Text: I only contacted you out of social etiquette...

STDM_0002901_0090.Text: Now, now, no need to be bashful, my friend!

STDM_0002901_0100.Text: I'm not. And I do trust you, Gojo.

STDM_0002901_0110.Text: Huh, a rare moment of honesty!

STDM_0002901_0120.Text: That doesn't mean I respect you, though.

STDM_0003001_0040.Text: But weird's his normal, isn't it?

STDM_0003001_0050.Text: Let's observe him for a bit.

STDM_0003001_0070.Text: People who can't follow rules and regulations are denounced as scum, but the real human garbage are those who don't treasure their friends.

STDM_0003001_0090.Text: Doubt makes for a good instructor. Still, you've got to put on a brave face, and never let them see you sweat.

STDM_0003001_0100.Text: I wonder what he's saying to Maki?

STDM_0003001_0110.Text: No matter what you do, never forget where you came from!

STDM_0003001_0120.Text: I knew it, he's being weird.

STDM_0003001_0130.Text: Naw, this is par for the course.

STDM_0003001_0140.Text: That schmuck...he's letting his manga influence him again!

STDM_0003101_0010.Text: Huh, your paws work with smartphones, Panda!

STDM_0003101_0030.Text: I wondered if it'd work with a stuffed animal.

STDM_0003101_0040.Text: Morning! How's it hanging? Oh, nice wallpaper, Panda!

STDM_0003101_0060.Text: Oh yeah, Masamichi called it "wallpaper" too. You don't hear people call it that so much these days.

STDM_0003101_0080.Text: That was the go-to back in my student days, though.

STDM_0003101_0090.Text: What did you put as your "wallpaper," then?

STDM_0003101_0100.Text: You wanna know, hmm? Do ya?

STDM_0003101_0110.Text: What an annoying old fart you are.

STDM_0003101_0130.Text: Nope, not yet! I'm still in the springtime of life!

STDM_0003101_0140.Text: That's exactly what an old fart would say. You two, time to train!

STDM_0003101_0170.Text: Love to see it. Ain't youth grand?

STDM_0003201_0040.Text: It's needless to say, but we need to be constantly wary of Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0003201_0070.Text: It's just, Satoru Gojo is a wild card. No telling what he'll do next.

STDM_0003201_0090.Text: Nobody's worried about you, damn it!

STDM_0003201_0100.Text: Very well. At any rate, don't you worry. I'm not so foolish as to take on Satoru Gojo. If I sense him coming, I'll retreat at once.

STDM_0003201_0110.Text: You'd better. There's still a bucketload of things we'll need you to take care of.

STDM_0003201_0120.Text: I have no intention of dying so easily, you know. For the sake of this planet's future...

STDM_0003301_0010.Text: --One day, before Yuta Okkotsu entered Jujutsu High...

STDM_0003301_0020.Text: Satoru told us we gotta clean this room.

STDM_0003301_0030.Text: That mean we're getting a transfer student or something?

STDM_0003301_0050.Text: What kinda guy's it gonna be, I wonder?

STDM_0003301_0060.Text: If it's some chickenshit, I'll knock him into shape.

STDM_0003301_0080.Text: Welp, let's figure out which of us is on cleaning duty!

STDM_0003301_0090.Text: Don't think I'm gonna lose this one.

STDM_0003401_0030.Text: This girl doesn't know how to say thank you, is all.

STDM_0003401_0050.Text: That wasn't me anyway, that was all Rika, so...

STDM_0003401_0060.Text: And you carried her out of there, didn't you?

STDM_0003401_0070.Text: You'll have a lot of backbreaking labor like that in the future, too.

STDM_0003401_0080.Text: You'd better train him good, Maki.

STDM_0003401_0090.Text:
I hate to say it, but I owe you one.
I'll be sure to show you the ropes.

STDM_0003501_0020.Text: How'd it turn out like this?

STDM_0003501_0030.Text: Let's do a secret hot pot! That'll help us all grow that much closer.

STDM_0003501_0040.Text: I don't know how it works, I've never done one before. You sure it's okay if I join?

STDM_0003501_0050.Text: Sure, I'm sure! I'm in the same boat as you, this'll be my first time.

STDM_0003501_0060.Text: I figure we just throw stuff in the pot and see what happens.

STDM_0003501_0080.Text: That's the way it goes, so everyone bring your favorite ingredient!

STDM_0003501_0120.Text: How mundane! You don't get how secret hot pot goes, Yuta!

STDM_0003501_0130.Text: But you said you've never done it, either...

STDM_0003501_0150.Text: Salmon, bonito flakes, salted roe, tuna mayo, mustard leaf, kelp, salmon roe, pollock roe.

STDM_0003501_0160.Text: Just rice ball ingredients? At least bring some rice, too.

STDM_0003501_0170.Text: And you, Maki? What have you brought?

STDM_0003501_0180.Text: Just some stuff from a fast-food joint along the way.

STDM_0003501_0190.Text: You're just gonna eat it straight up, aren't you?

STDM_0003501_0200.Text: Don't be stupid! Of course it's all going in the pot.

STDM_0003501_0210.Text: A burger and chips, fine, but leave out the cola, surely!

STDM_0003501_0240.Text: Nothing but calpas, huh? That's about what I expected.

STDM_0003501_0250.Text: Let's just do what we can with what we've got.

STDM_0003501_0260.Text: I don't like where this is going...

STDM_0003501_0310.Text: The heck is this? Looks like a Cursed Spirit...

STDM_0003501_0320.Text: Stop... I don't think my appetite can take anymore...

STDM_0003501_0340.Text: Take responsibility for this, Panda. Eat it all.

STDM_0003501_0360.Text: And in the end, they all ate happily ever after.

STDM_0003601_0030.Text: It seemed like he's an acquaintance of Gojo's, at very least.

STDM_0003601_0040.Text: And what he said to Maki...

STDM_0003601_0060.Text: What could he have meant by that?

STDM_0003601_0070.Text: I mean, just look how strong she is.

STDM_0003601_0080.Text: Thinking about it won't help anything. I'll just keep swinging my sword, focus on training.

STDM_0003701_0010.Text: Your Cursed Technique was incredible, Inumaki. You took them all down with one word! Looks harsh on your throat, though.

STDM_0003701_0020.Text: Salted roe, mustard leaf, pollock roe.

STDM_0003701_0030.Text: Yeah! It's cool you have confidence in your martial arts, too.

STDM_0003701_0050.Text: Oh, you think? I've got a long way to go compared to you.

STDM_0003701_0080.Text: I just realized I could talk to you like normal all of a sudden.

STDM_0003801_0010.Text: Your injuries all better, you two?

STDM_0003801_0030.Text: Yeah! As you can see, my arm's right as rain.

STDM_0003801_0040.Text: Your voice is back to normal too, Inumaki. Thank goodness...

STDM_0003801_0050.Text: Say, Yuta. Seems like you feel responsible for all this, but you really don't have to.

STDM_0003801_0070.Text: You ended up saving everyone, and it was you who drove off Geto. You sure have gotten strong.

STDM_0003801_0100.Text: There, there, we're awful proud of you, y'know!

STDM_0003801_0120.Text: Sounds like you're praising a little kid...

STDM_0003901_0010.Text: You getting on with Maki, Yuta?

STDM_0003901_0020.Text: Hmm, well, she does help me train every day.

STDM_0003901_0030.Text: She can be pretty harsh sometimes...

STDM_0003901_0040.Text: And how're things going with Toge?

STDM_0003901_0050.Text: I still don't understand anything Inumaki says. Which makes me a little scared of him.

STDM_0003901_0060.Text: Is that right? Being a Cursed Speech user, Toge has had to go through a lot.

STDM_0003901_0070.Text: No rush, but I hope you guys end up getting along someday.

STDM_0003901_0080.Text: You're kinda like a dad to everyone, huh, Panda...

STDM_0004001_0010.Text: I wondered what would happen when I first enrolled here... But everyone's been so nice to me, and I think things are going well.

STDM_0004001_0050.Text: I never imagined fighting against Cursed Spirits, but the training's helped me move like never before. I'm starting to get some confidence, too...I think.

STDM_0004001_0060.Text: No spacing out during a fight!

STDM_0004001_0110.Text: Makiii, shouldn't you go a little easy on the guy?

STDM_0004001_0120.Text: How's he supposed to get stronger if I baby him?!

STDM_0004001_0160.Text: Damn it, get back here, you shit bear!

STDM_0004001_0190.Text: You're right about that. Say, I wanna spar with you next, Inumaki.

STDM_0004101_0010.Text: Looks like you're back in tip-top shape, Jogo.

STDM_0004101_0020.Text: As if there'd be any other outcome.

STDM_0004101_0030.Text: No weird changes in your body?

STDM_0004101_0040.Text: Not a chance. Don't lump me in with the humans.

STDM_0004101_0050.Text: That's good to hear. And what about your soul?

STDM_0004101_0070.Text: For example, do the words "Satoru Gojo" cause any marked signs of rejection?

STDM_0004101_0090.Text: Pretty strong denial, there. Did I hit the mark?

STDM_0004101_0100.Text: Watch your tongue! Next time I'll reduce that bastard to ash.

STDM_0004101_0110.Text: Or end up a head again.

STDM_0004101_0120.Text: How far do you intend to mock me?!

STDM_0004201_0010.Text: Still, it's hard to believe he did such a number on you, Hanami.

STDM_0004201_0020.Text: Unavoidable I guess, against Satoru Gojo.

STDM_0004201_0030.Text: No, that's not the only reason.

STDM_0004201_0050.Text: Sukuna's vessel, and one more...another Jujutsu Sorcerer. They really whittled me down.

STDM_0004201_0060.Text: So there were others besides Gojo capable of cornering you, huh?

STDM_0004201_0070.Text: The Sorcerer had a scar on his face.

STDM_0004201_0080.Text: This is just conjecture, but I believe his Cursed Technique allowed him to switch the places of anything possessing Cursed Energy.

STDM_0004201_0090.Text: I see, it'd be hard to fight in all the confusion.

STDM_0004201_0100.Text: Be wary of it if you ever end up going against him, Mahito.

STDM_0004301_0010.Text: Hanamiii! Let's have a penalty shootout!

STDM_0004301_0030.Text: You'll get it if we play.

STDM_0004301_0040.Text: I'll stand in the goal, and you'll win if you can get the ball past me.

STDM_0004301_0060.Text: Hey! You're not allowed to use your Cursed Technique!

STDM_0004301_0070.Text: I thought that was the point.

STDM_0004301_0090.Text: All you have to do is kick as hard as you can.

STDM_0004301_0110.Text: Where do you think you're aiming?

STDM_0004301_0160.Text: It wasn't me! It was Hanami!

STDM_0004301_0180.Text: ...Mahito. Looks like Jogo wants a match now.

STDM_0004401_0010.Text: Looks like you're back in perfect shape, Jogo.

STDM_0004401_0020.Text: 'Suppose I am, yeah. All I need is time to get my Cursed Energy back.

STDM_0004401_0030.Text: I took him on expecting some light entertainment. Never thought he'd be that extraordinary.

STDM_0004401_0040.Text: The Sorcerer Satoru Gojo... His reputation precedes him.

STDM_0004401_0050.Text: Still, the age of Curses can't begin until he's dealt with.

STDM_0004401_0060.Text: That's why we need to come up with a plan.

STDM_0004401_0070.Text: I refuse to let myself be disgraced like that ever again...!

STDM_0004401_0080.Text: I'm just glad you're safe, Jogo.

STDM_0004401_0090.Text: Hmph, I owe you a big one, that's for sure.

STDM_0004501_0010.Text: I had a feeling you were a strange one, Yuji, even before you entered Jujutsu High.

STDM_0004501_0020.Text: Isn't that the pot calling the kettle black, Gojo?

STDM_0004501_0030.Text: To the layperson, Curses are just monsters, you know? And yet, you threw yourself at one without hesitation to save Megumi.

STDM_0004501_0040.Text: And most people would take more than a moment before gulping down one of Sukuna's fingers.

STDM_0004501_0050.Text: You're even willing to go bungee jumping with vinyl cord.

STDM_0004501_0060.Text: You were there for that, y'know!

STDM_0004501_0080.Text: On the Yasohachi Bridge mission, see, he—

STDM_0004501_0090.Text: Shhh! I don't need Nitta yelling at me all over again.

STDM_0004501_0100.Text: Well, at least you're aware that you did something to be scolded over.

STDM_0004501_0120.Text: You realize I'm giving you a compliment, right? Jujutsu Sorcerers have to be a bit strange in the head.

STDM_0004501_0130.Text: Is that right? If it's praise, then fine by me!

STDM_0004501_0140.Text: Hey now, we came all the way out to the city, we oughta eat some ramen before we head back!

STDM_0004501_0160.Text: Ramen's something a guy can never get sick of. Right, Gojo?

STDM_0004501_0170.Text: Works for me. What about you, Megumi, any requests?

STDM_0004501_0180.Text: Hmm... I'm good with anything, I guess.

STDM_0004501_0190.Text: Okay, then, today's a special treat! Gojo's gonna take you to his personal three-star ramen spot!
